suite.name: MacParakeet ASR Benchmark Suite
suite.purpose: A product-owned, reproducible benchmark contract for choosing local ASR engines on Apple Silicon across accuracy, latency, memory, language coverage, and MacParakeet product surfaces.
principles: Score every hypothesis through the same normalizer and metric implementation.
Keep public research datasets separate from private product fixtures.
Report uncertainty and use paired tests for engine-vs-engine claims.
Measure accuracy, speed, memory, and product-surface support separately.
Publish enough provenance for another MacParakeet checkout to reproduce the numbers.

engines.name: Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3
engines.caveat: Fast default, but current FLEURS evidence shows CJK/Korean failures.

engines.name: Nemotron English 1120ms Beta
engines.caveat: Beta engine; benchmarked as dominated by Parakeet on current English evidence.

engines.name: Nemotron Multilingual 1120ms Beta
engines.caveat: Beta engine; keep benchmarked but do not promote without new evidence.

engines.name: WhisperKit large-v3-turbo
engines.caveat: Light multilingual fallback; live preview remains default-off pending latency evidence.

engines.name: Cohere Transcribe 03-2026 q8
engines.caveat: Batch-only, no live preview, no word timestamps, no auto language detection, and should stay 16 GB+ gated unless new memory evidence says otherwise.

datasets.name: LibriSpeech test-clean
datasets.license: Public-domain-derived audiobook corpus; see OpenSLR SLR12.

datasets.name: LibriSpeech test-other
datasets.license: Public-domain-derived audiobook corpus; see OpenSLR SLR12.

datasets.name: FLEURS en/ko/ja/zh
datasets.expected_size: 150 utterances per language in committed evidence; expand before publishing language-routing absolutes.

datasets.name: AMI Meeting Corpus
datasets.expected_size: Use a fixed, documented subset before promoting meeting-engine decisions.

datasets.name: MacParakeet private product fixtures
datasets.license: Do not commit audio or transcripts without explicit consent.
datasets.domain: real dictation, meeting, file, and media workflows
datasets.expected_size: Small consented regression set plus rotating internal challenge set.

datasets.name: Local speed and memory micro-benchmark
datasets.domain: cold start, steady RTFx, peak RSS
datasets.expected_size: 24 LibriSpeech files for integrated engines; Cohere reference evidence currently from FluidAudio CLI.

metrics.name: Character error rate
metrics.notes: Used for Korean, Japanese, Chinese, Thai, and related no-space languages.

metrics.name: Paired bootstrap delta CI
metrics.notes: Required for engine-vs-engine claims on shared utterance sets.

metrics.name: Bootstrap confidence interval
metrics.notes: 95% CI by resampling utterances with a fixed seed.

metrics.name: Product surface support
metrics.notes: Explicitly records whether an engine can serve live preview, final transcription, meeting, file/media, and performance tasks.

tasks.name: English full-set accuracy
tasks.runner: run_macparakeet.py for shipping engines; fa_json_to_jsonl.py only for legacy FluidAudio reference imports.
tasks.publication_rule: Use full test-clean and test-other for English claims; do not cite first-N subsets as final.

tasks.name: Multilingual directional accuracy
tasks.runner: run_macparakeet_fleurs.py for shipping engines; fa_json_to_jsonl.py only for legacy FluidAudio reference imports.
tasks.publication_rule: Treat n=150/language as ranking-grade; expand before shipping automatic language routing.

tasks.name: Meeting transcription accuracy
tasks.publication_rule: Separate final transcript quality from live-preview behavior and speaker-label quality.

tasks.name: Live preview suitability
tasks.publication_rule: Do not infer live-preview quality from batch WER alone; Cohere and Whisper are excluded until product support changes.

tasks.name: Accented real-world English
tasks.publication_rule: Use when evaluating noisy/accented claims; LibriSpeech alone is not enough.

tasks.name: Speed and memory
tasks.publication_rule: Report hardware, macOS version, model path, runtime path, contention assumptions, and whether Cohere was measured through macparakeet-cli or FluidAudio reference CLI.

quality_gates.name: Speech-engine default or routing change
required_evidence: Full English LibriSpeech test-clean and test-other results
Relevant multilingual or domain dataset results
Paired bootstrap deltas for claimed wins
Speed, cold-start, and peak-RSS measurements on supported hardware
Explicit product-surface support check for dictation, meeting, file/media, and live preview

quality_gates.name: Published benchmark refresh
required_evidence: Pinned MacParakeet commit and CLI version
Dataset source, split, utterance count, and selection policy
Raw hypotheses or compressed artifact available when license-safe
